'''Rol Two''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="AIR" /> situated in the [[Rol system/Legends|Rol system]], a part of the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it hosted [[Prison/Legends|detention facilities]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AIR" />

At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Zayl Braith]], who had been [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]] for several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] aboard the Imperial [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 ''Interdictor''-class Heavy Cruiser]] ''[[Tory's Catcher]]'' after being captured in the Noonian [[Sector/Legends|sector]], was transferred to the detention facilities on Rol Two. There, however, Braith escaped from the Empire and traveled off-world, with Imperial authorities continuing to hunt for her<ref name="AIR" /> by 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].<ref name="Date" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rol Two was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Rol [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-6.<ref name="TEA" />
